description: A regional symposium for software engineers focusing on deploying Generative AI models to the cloud and building scalable full-stack applications.
suggestions: I’ve been experimenting with generative AI to auto‑generate UI components in React—how are you incorporating AI into your MERN stack workflows?
Vertex AI and BigQuery on GCP seem game‑changing for ML pipelines—what GCP services do you rely on for data‑driven full‑stack applications?
Deploying real‑time inference in a Node/Express API can strain resources—what scaling strategies have you found effective on Google Cloud?
